action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline is 0.453 at 3 epochs. Train.py supports --resume. Each epoch ~690s. Remaining 9.14h, 7 iterations. Analysis: I need to scale up. Best path: train fresh from scratch with 20 epochs (~4h) using proper poly schedule for full schedule (currently the 3-epoch model used a shorter schedule). Actually since I have last.pt from 3-epoch run with completed schedule, resuming would have lr near 0. Better: train fresh for 20 epochs with proper schedule. ~4h training + 0.1h eval. Then maybe one more iteration. Decision: launch fresh 20-epoch training.
action.command: cd /workspace && nohup python launch.py --epochs 20 --batch_size 4 --lr 6e-5 --crop_size 512 --num_workers 4 --save_dir checkpoints > train20.log 2>err20.log; tail -50 train20.log; echo '---STDERR---'; tail -50 err20.log
